competitor_map.name: Tastewise
competitor_map.why: ANCHOR. F&B-native GenAI/agentic intelligence unifying consumer, foodservice, e-retail and recipe signals; agents produce sell-in kits, briefs and concepts (TasteGPT). Defines the decision-velocity band — insight + execution in one workflow.

competitor_map.name: Datassential
competitor_map.why: Deepest foodservice/operator data moat (reinforced by CHD Expert + Brizo acquisitions), 90%+ penetration of top foodservice/CPG, moving aggressively on the same agentic thesis (Datassential One GenAI search + MCP 'API for AI'). Tastewise's most resourced direct rival.

competitor_map.name: Ai Palette
competitor_map.why: Foresight Engine (61B data points) + Concept Genie GenAI concept generation + Screen Winner + FoodGPT. Trend → concept → screen workflow = decision acceleration, now with GlobalData's syndicated depth and public-company capital.

competitor_map.name: Foodpairing AI
competitor_map.why: Flavor-intelligence + predictive NPD: Consumer Flavor Intelligence, FlavorID, ~140k digital-twin consumers, predicts liking/buying intent 75-85%, turns months into days. Predictive + prescriptive formulation/concept execution, F&B-native.

competitor_map.name: NotCo (Giuseppe)
competitor_map.why: Proprietary AI formulation engine (300k+ plant database, FTIR/GC sensory corpus); B2B 'AI infrastructure for FMCG', Kraft Heinz JV. Executes the deepest decision — generates manufacturable formulas — though scoped to formulation.

competitor_map.name: Spoonshot
competitor_map.why: AI food/beverage intelligence (food science + #foodbrain): trend prediction + concept creation + competitive analysis. F&B-native, action-oriented insight; smaller data scale than Tastewise.

competitor_map.name: Starday Foods
competitor_map.why: AI + culinary R&D: trend exploration, consumer-content analysis, predictions, review insights, retail DB → R&D briefs/concepts in weeks. End-to-end insight→R&D→shelf execution; emerging challenger most resembling Tastewise's model.

competitor_map.name: Halla
competitor_map.why: 'Taste Intelligence' AI for grocery (recommend/substitute/search, 100B+ data points). Real-time decision automation, but retail-recommendation scoped.

competitor_map.name: CHEW Innovation
competitor_map.why: Consumer-first culinary innovation + commercialization (5,000+ products, $8B+ client value). Executes product development end-to-end (services + tools), though lab/consultancy model rather than pure software.

competitor_map.name: Black Swan Data
competitor_map.why: Trendscope social-prediction SaaS; TPV algorithm claims 89% accuracy six-months out, ~500k product-level trends/month (PepsiCo, Unilever, Mars). Strong predictive layer — now feeding Mintel.

competitor_map.name: Spate
competitor_map.why: AI search-based trend prediction (900B Google signals, 200M TikTok/IG posts), beauty + food, 200+ brands. Early-signal prediction, not full F&B execution.

competitor_map.name: Gastrograph AI
competitor_map.why: AI sensory/flavor prediction modeling preference across demographics (backed by Sony/BASF). Deep sensory prediction; now part of NIQ's data stack.

competitor_map.name: Tastry
competitor_map.why: Sensory-science AI: chemistry 'digital twins' + consumer palate matrices to predict preference (wine/beer/CPG). Predictive + recommends GTM moves, but narrow sensory niche.

competitor_map.name: Suzy
competitor_map.why: Real-time consumer research (70+ panels, Suzy Speaks AI interviews, Suzy Signals trend engine). Fast iterative insight + AI moderation; decision-support, not F&B-native execution.

competitor_map.name: Zappi
competitor_map.why: Agile consumer insights / ad + concept testing (1.2B historical data points; PepsiCo/McDonald's/Heineken). Predictive ad/innovation testing; iterative but generic CPG.

competitor_map.name: Attest
competitor_map.why: Fast consumer research across 150+ markets. Quick-turn survey data, decision-support.

competitor_map.name: Vypr
competitor_map.why: Product intelligence platform (100k+ consumer community, AI-powered Vypr Predict). Fast product-decision testing; predictive but survey-led.

competitor_map.name: Toluna
competitor_map.why: Consumer intelligence with 79M+ panel and HarmonAIze synthetic personas. Panel + AI personas; cross-industry.

competitor_map.name: Quantilope
competitor_map.why: Automated/agile consumer insights (used by Kraft Heinz for trend-to-campaign). Automated insight, decision-support.

competitor_map.name: GWI
competitor_map.why: Audience/consumer data platform. Audience profiling input.

competitor_map.name: Upsiide
competitor_map.why: Swipe-based innovation screening (up to 50 ideas/study) by Dig Insights. Early-funnel idea screening, predictive-ish.

competitor_map.name: Trend Hunter
competitor_map.why: Crowd + AI trend reports across industries. Broad ideation, low F&B specificity but trend-oriented.

competitor_map.name: Gravel AI
competitor_map.why: AI/NLP ingredient + market-trend intelligence (positioned as a Mintel GNPD alternative), beauty/personal-care-leaning. Trend/ingredient prediction, adjacent to F&B.

competitor_map.name: Journey Foods
competitor_map.why: JourneyAI — AI ingredient intelligence + formulation/portfolio optimization software for CPG. Predictive formulation insight, early-stage.

competitor_map.name: Climax Foods
competitor_map.why: AI 'Deep Plant Intelligence' formulation for animal-free cheese (Bel Group partnership). AI-driven formulation prediction sitting between insight and execution, narrow category.

competitor_map.name: NielsenIQ (NIQ)
competitor_map.why: Global retail measurement (POS scanner, Homescan panel 250k+ households/25 countries); agreed to acquire Gastrograph AI and merged GfK. Deepest retail-sales data; AI/decision layer still emerging.

competitor_map.name: Circana
competitor_map.why: Syndicated POS, MULO/MULO+, foodservice (ex-NPD). Vast proprietary data; analytics-led, not agentic execution.

competitor_map.name: Kantar / Numerator
competitor_map.why: Combined (Jan 2025) zero-party consumer/shopper panel data, ~5B consumers. Currency-grade panel depth, descriptive shopper insight.

competitor_map.name: SPINS
competitor_map.why: Natural/organic/specialty retail data; health-and-wellness ontology and product attribution. Deep niche data, dashboards over decision-execution.

competitor_map.name: GfK
competitor_map.why: Consumer/retail intelligence (now merged into NIQ). Point-of-sale and consumer panels, descriptive.

competitor_map.name: Euromonitor
competitor_map.why: Syndicated global market research (Passport DB, 210 countries). Macro market sizing and long-range strategy, slow-cycle.

competitor_map.name: Mintel
competitor_map.why: Market intelligence, Global New Products Database (GNPD), Spark concept tool; acquired Black Swan Data. Deep product-launch + claims data; report-led but actively bolting on a predictive layer.

competitor_map.name: GlobalData
competitor_map.why: Market intelligence (One Platform, Intelligence Centers); acquired Ai Palette. Broad syndicated data; pushing into AI.

competitor_map.name: Innova Market Insights
competitor_map.why: F&B-specialized market intelligence (product launches, ingredient/claims tracking), 30+ years. Deep F&B product database, descriptive/innovation-tracking.

competitor_map.name: Technomic
competitor_map.why: Foodservice research/consulting (Ignite platform, Top 500, menu/operator data); launched Ignite AI. Deep foodservice data; adding AI agents but consulting-led.

competitor_map.name: CHD Expert
competitor_map.why: Foodservice operator database; acquired by Datassential 2022. Operator data feed, now folded into Datassential's platform.

competitor_map.name: Bedrock Analytics
competitor_map.why: CPG data harmonization across NIQ/Circana/SPINS for retailer-ready stories. Harmonization/visualization layer atop syndicated data.

competitor_map.name: Profitero
competitor_map.why: E-commerce/digital-shelf analytics (owned by Publicis). Online sales/shelf data, descriptive.

competitor_map.name: Brandwatch
competitor_map.why: Enterprise social listening / consumer intelligence (Iris AI, 1.7T historical conversations); cross-industry, not F&B-native. Broad social data, no F&B ontology or decision tooling.

competitor_map.name: Meltwater
competitor_map.why: Media monitoring + social listening; PR/brand-reputation focus. Generic listening, F&B is just one vertical.

competitor_map.name: Talkwalker
competitor_map.why: Social listening with Blue Silk AI, 187-language sentiment, image recognition; part of Hootsuite. Breadth over F&B depth.

competitor_map.name: Sprinklr
competitor_map.why: Unified CXM + social listening suite (Sprinklr AI+); enterprise, cross-industry. Customer-experience platform, not F&B decisions.

competitor_map.name: Sprout Social
competitor_map.why: Social management + listening; publishing-led. Marketing tool, shallow F&B specificity.

competitor_map.name: NetBase Quid
competitor_map.why: Social + market intelligence with network/semantic mapping (Nestlé, PepsiCo). Strong analytics but generic, not execution-oriented.

competitor_map.name: Pulsar
competitor_map.why: Audience intelligence / cultural insight platform (TikTok, Reddit, Bluesky). Trend-spotting input, not F&B decisions.

competitor_map.name: Latana
competitor_map.why: AI-driven brand tracking. Brand metrics, not F&B trend/decision tooling.

competitor_map.name: YouScan
competitor_map.why: Visual/image social listening (logo + object detection). Visual signal feed, generic.

competitor_map.name: Synthesio
competitor_map.why: Social listening / brand health; owned by Ipsos. Generic social intelligence.

competitor_map.name: Crisp
competitor_map.why: Vertical AI for retail data integration (POS/supply-chain from 40+ retailers/distributors). Data plumbing/supply-chain optimization, not consumer-trend decisioning — a raw-data conduit.

competitor_map.name: Coca-Cola / large-CPG internal AI
competitor_map.why: Adjacent reference, not a vendor. In-house generative-AI flavor & innovation initiatives (e.g. Coca-Cola Y3000) represent the 'build vs. buy' alternative large brands weigh against Tastewise. Captive decision-engines inside the very customers Tastewise sells to — a long-run substitution risk.

insights.title: AI Becomes Core to Predictive Food Formulation & Sensory Optimization
insights.insight: Competitors are deepening AI's role in product development, moving beyond ideation to active formulation, ingredient interaction prediction, and sensory optimization. This requires Tastewise to demonstrate its capability in not only identifying trends but also providing actionable, AI-driven guidance for precise product creation and refinement for food scientists and CPG brands.
insights.trend: The underlying market force is the demand for faster, more efficient, and data-driven R&D cycles, where AI acts as a co-creator and predictive tool to reduce development costs and improve product success rates by simulating complex ingredient interactions and sensory outcomes.
evidence: TraceGains Unveils Formula AI, an AI-Powered Laboratory and Workspace for Food Scientists
Ipsos Launches Product Studio: A New Era of Product Testing
Food Makers Deploy AI Across Full Product Development Cycle
AI enables faster food formulation cycles, as “generative tools can explore thousands of ideas rapidly.”
AI predicts taste, mouthfeel, melting, crispiness and guides optimization for alt-meat, alt-dairy, beverages, and ready meals.
Cargill is embedding AI across the full innovation journey, from early consumer insight and concept development through formulation, scale-up, and execution.
AI framework suggests 1-3 ingredient swaps for healthier, cheaper meals.

insights.title: AI Drives Proactive & Predictive Restaurant Operational Intelligence
insights.insight: New solutions are enhancing restaurant operations with AI for proactive risk management, real-time kitchen optimization, and comprehensive revenue intelligence. Tastewise must integrate its consumer and menu trend data into these advanced operational AI layers to offer a holistic view that connects demand signals directly to predictive operational adjustments and profitability strategies.
insights.trend: The market is shifting towards AI solutions that provide predictive and prescriptive insights, enabling restaurants to move from reactive management to proactive optimization of costs, labor, inventory, and customer experience in real-time.
evidence: allO Raises $14M Series A to Scale the First AI-Native Operating System for Restaurants
Sapaad Launches "Sapaad Signals," One of the Industry's First Pre-Loss Intelligence Systems for Restaurants
Restrofi: Revolutionizing Indian Restaurants with Smart Automation and RestroAI Revenue Intelligence
Tech Spotlight: PreciTaste and the Power of Vision AI in the Kitchen
AI is helping restaurants go beyond basic personalization by using customer behavior and order history to predict demand and guide decisions.
AI helps operators improve labor, reduce waste, and make faster, more informed decisions.

insights.title: Agentic AI & Social Commerce Redefine Personalized Grocery & Retail
insights.insight: The F&B retail landscape is evolving with agentic AI for automated grocery assistance and social commerce solutions that leverage behavioral models for dynamic intent prediction. Tastewise should focus on connecting its trend insights with these granular, predictive behavioral models to enable hyper-targeted marketing, personalized product recommendations, and optimized retail strategies, including emerging social selling channels.
insights.trend: Consumer expectations for hyper-personalization and convenience are driving the adoption of AI agents that can automate shopping, analyze social behavior, and deliver dynamic, individualized retail experiences, shifting influence from traditional supermarkets to direct-to-consumer and social channels.
evidence: Tre'dish Revolutionizes Grocery Shopping with AI
NIQ Launches Survey Groups to Connect Consumer Sentiment with Real Purchase Behavior
Circana Introduces Social Commerce Solution to Decode Social Sales Performance
ZeroToOne.AI Deploys its Large Behavioral Model at Advertising Scale Through GroundTruth, Launching Dynamic Intent Prediction Audiences
AI systems are being used to regularly fill weekly household grocery orders without human input.
One Singaporean retailer has accumulated sufficient data on shopping patterns to generate 200 personalised advertisements per customer.
Agentic AI, where digital assistants help consumers manage pantry inventory, recommend products, and automate reordering.

insights.title: Food-as-Medicine Ecosystems Emerge with AI-Driven Personalized Health
insights.insight: A significant new market is forming around 'Food as Medicine' and personalized nutrition, with platforms integrating health data, dietary recommendations, and food delivery to address chronic conditions. Tastewise has a unique opportunity to provide the underlying food and beverage intelligence for these ecosystems, connecting consumer health trends, specific ingredient efficacy, and recipe development to support personalized health outcomes.
insights.trend: The increasing prevalence of chronic diseases and a growing consumer demand for personalized health and wellness solutions are driving the convergence of healthcare, nutrition science, and food technology, creating integrated platforms that leverage AI for tailored dietary interventions.
evidence: Qina launches Food Health Ecosystem to improve access to real-world data
KC-built Attane Health merges with digital grocery pioneer to forge food-is-medicine platform
Fresh Connect Now Offers Four Benefit Cards and an App
Personalized Nutrition AI Platforms market was estimated at USD 1.48 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow to USD 18.7 billion by 2034.
Food & Health Angels Network launches to accelerate metabolic health innovations to market
AI framework that suggests just one to three ingredient swaps can make meals meaningfully more nutritious and less expensive.
The growing importance of “Food as Medicine” and how retailers can use analytics to support healthier purchasing decisions.

insights.title: AI Accelerates End-to-End F&B Product Development
insights.insight: Competitors are launching AI-powered platforms that integrate real-time data with AI-driven formulation and testing, enabling food scientists and CPG brands to accelerate new product development from concept to market. This signifies a move towards AI as a co-creator in innovation, requiring Tastewise to demonstrate its capability in guiding not just trend identification but also tangible product formulation and optimization.
insights.trend: The increasing sophistication of AI models and the demand for faster, more efficient innovation cycles are pushing AI's role beyond analytics into direct R&D and product creation, streamlining the entire product lifecycle.
evidence: https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/tracegains-unveils-formula-ai-an-ai-powered-laboratory-and-workspace-for-food-scientists-302782707.html
https://www.ipsos.com/en/ipsos-launches-product-studio-new-era-product-testing
https://mathco.com/article/orchestrating-cpg-launches-with-an-end-to-end-synthetic-intelligence-ecosystem/
https://theconsumerdaily.co/news/food-makers-deploy-ai-across-full-product-development-cycle-f69b3dfd

insights.title: AI-Native Operating Systems Transform Restaurant Operations
insights.insight: A significant influx of investment and new product launches focuses on AI-native operating systems for restaurants, addressing everything from customer experience and revenue intelligence to pre-loss prevention and kitchen efficiency. Tastewise must integrate its deep consumer and menu trend data into these operational AI layers to provide a holistic view that connects consumer demand directly to restaurant execution and profitability.
insights.trend: The acute need for operational efficiency, cost reduction, and enhanced customer experiences in the competitive foodservice sector is driving the adoption of comprehensive AI platforms that automate and optimize core restaurant functions.
evidence: https://bebeez.eu/2026/05/27/munichs-allo-raises-e12-million-series-a-to-expand-its-ai-operating-system-for-restaurants-across-europe/
https://www.tribuneindia.com/news/business/sapaad-launches-sapaad-signals-one-of-the-industrys-first-pre-loss-intelligence-systems-for-restaurants/
https://restaurantfinanceadvisors.com/tech-spotlight-precitaste-and-the-power-of-vision-ai-in-the-kitchen/
https://martechedge.com/news/moxie-labs-launches-fngrfood-for-restaurant-cx
https://indiabreakingbuzz.co.in/restrofi-revolutionizing-indian-restaurants-with-smart-automation-and-restroai-revenue-intelligence/

insights.title: Predictive Behavioral AI Drives Hyper-Personalized Consumer Engagement
insights.insight: New solutions are emerging that leverage large behavioral models and survey groups to connect consumer sentiment with real purchase behavior, enabling dynamic intent prediction and hyper-personalized grocery assistance. For Tastewise, this highlights the growing demand for granular, predictive consumer intelligence that can directly inform targeted marketing, retail strategies, and product offerings, emphasizing the need to connect broad trend insights with individual-level behavioral predictions.
insights.trend: Advances in AI and the availability of diverse, real-world behavioral data are enabling a shift from demographic-based targeting to highly accurate, predictive models of individual consumer intent and purchasing patterns, fostering a new era of hyper-personalization.
evidence: https://retail-insider.com/retail-insider/2026/05/tredish-launches-sproutai-the-first-ai-grocery-assistant-built-to-optimize-budgets/
https://nielseniq.com/global/en/news-center/2026/niq-launches-survey-groups-to-connect-consumer-sentiment-with-real-purchase-behavior/
https://www.circana.com/post/circana-introduces-social-commerce-solution-to-decode-social-sales-performance
https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/zerotooneai-deploys-its-large-behavioral-model-at-advertising-scale-through-groundtruth-launching-dynamic-intent-prediction-audiences-302784692.html
